title: Digital Product Payment Solutions in West Africa in One Afternoon: The Fast-Track Setup — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Ghana, and you're tired of being blocked by PayPal or Stripe. Your bank doesn't support international transactions, or you just don't want to deal with the hassle of opening a business account. Every time you try to sell your ebooks, courses, or art, you're met with a 'payment failed' message or a 'account limited' notice. You know there must be a better way to get paid for your digital products, without the need for a US-based payment processor. Today's the day you take control of your finances and start selling your digital products without the middlemen.
What You Can Actually Get Done Today

You can actually set up a fully automated payment system for your digital products in just one afternoon. This means no hassle, no waiting, and no more 'payment failed' messages. To start, you'll need to sign up for a NOWPayments account, which will serve as your payment processor. This means you'll have access to 300+ coins, no KYC required, and no buyer account needed. Once you've set up your NOWPayments account, you'll need to integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend into your website. This will allow your customers to make hassle-free payments using their preferred cryptocurrency. Don't worry if you're not tech-savvy – the Web3 Wallet Connect is user-friendly and easy to set up.
The Minimum Viable Setup That Works

The minimum viable setup that works for you today is to get your payment processor set up and your digital products listed on your website. This means creating a secure checkout process that allows customers to purchase your digital products using their preferred cryptocurrency. Don't worry about transaction logs or order management for now – just focus on getting the payment part right. Once you've got this working, you can worry about the finer details later. The key is to get something working as quickly as possible, so you can start selling your digital products and getting paid.
Skipping the Steps That Do Not Matter Yet

Don't worry about creating a beautiful website or writing a sales page just yet. Focus on getting your payment processor set up and your digital products listed on your website. You can always add more features later, but for now, focus on getting the payment part working. This means skipping steps like creating a business plan, setting up a marketing strategy, or designing a logo. Just focus on getting your digital products in front of customers and getting paid.
Don't let PayPal or Stripe hold you back from selling your digital products.
Getting Your First Transaction Live

Getting your first transaction live is the most important thing to focus on today. This means getting your payment processor set up, integrating the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend, and listing your digital products on your website. Once you've got this working, you can test the system with a small group of customers. This will help you iron out any issues and make sure everything is working correctly. Don't worry if things don't go smoothly at first – it's all part of the process.
What to Do in the Next 24 Hours
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

Yes, you can definitely get paid for your digital products without using PayPal or Stripe. In fact, using a blockchain-based payment processor like NOWPayments is a more secure and reliable way to get paid. All you need to do is sign up for a NOWPayments account, integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend, and list your digital products on your website. This will allow you to accept payments in 300+ coins, with no KYC required and no buyer account needed. So don't worry – you can get paid for your digital products without the hassle of US-based payment processors.
Blockchain-based payments are the future of digital product sales – and you can get started today.

You can also check out our product page, which features the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend and other tools for selling digital products without the need for US-based payment processors.
Your Action Checklist

Here's what you need to do to get your digital products selling today: Sign up for a NOWPayments account and set up your payment processor. Integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend into your website. List your digital products on your website. Test the checkout process and make sure transactions are going through. Iron out any issues and make sure everything is working correctly. Test your payment processor with a small group of customers. Promote your digital products and get more customers. Get paid for your digital products without the hassle of US-based payment processors.
With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can accept payments in 300+ coins, with no KYC required and no buyer account needed.
